metadata.name: clients-core
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: A collection of Python connection clients for E360 Microservices

classes.name: clients_core.utils.ResponseErrorHelper

methods.name: clients_core.utils.ResponseErrorHelper.__post_init__
documentation: Captures an exception for HttpError, saves as `self.exception`.

methods.name: clients_core.utils.ResponseErrorHelper.raise_exception
documentation:
Fetches a message from the server and raises an exception with it.

Raises:
    HttpResponseError

methods.name: clients_core.utils.ResponseErrorHelper._get_server_error_message
documentation: Gets the "message" from Json resonse body, or falls back to `_default_message`.

Helps handling Http error response exception raising.

Args:

: response (requests.Response): takes a Response instance as an argument.

`self._default_message`: default message when the server does not provide a Json with "message".

methods.name: clients_core.authentication.token_handler.TokenHandler.get_endpoint_url
documentation:
Returns a string that will identify the source of the token fetched
Used by TokenCache for key generation

classes.name: clients_core.exceptions.ClientException
documentation: Base level exception for all errors specific to e360 python clients

classes.name: clients_core.exceptions.ClientValueError
documentation: Error for when the response is provided, but does not match expected value/format/content.

classes.name: clients_core.exceptions.HttpResponseError
documentation: Error used when the Microservice returns a non-2XX response

classes.name: clients_core.secured_rest_client.SecuredRestClient
documentation: Secured API Client provides interface for HTTP requests, applies claims and token

functions.name: clients_core.settings.get_environ
documentation:
Function for a lazy loading of an Environ instance.
reload (bool): forces the environment variables to be re-read.

classes.name: clients_core.settings.Environ
documentation: Dataclass for holing environment variables with defaults

classes.name: clients_core.service_clients.E360ServiceClient

methods.name: clients_core.service_clients.E360ServiceClient.service_endpoint
documentation:
``
Class proterty holding an endpoint value.

Examples:
    ```
    class SomeClient(E360ServiceClient):
        service_endpoint = 'services'
    ```

methods.name: clients_core.service_clients.E360ServiceClient.get_ims_claims_for_user
documentation: Returns a dictionary with the X-Ims-Claims encoded header containing the user_id.

Abstract Service Client dataclass, to be used for building other microservice clients.

Args:
    client: an instance of a simple or secure rest client
    user_id: the user_id guid
    correlation_id: optional, correlation id when available

classes.name: clients_core.api_match_client.MatchSpec
documentation: Used to determine the endpoint that is required by the client
